criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on app stores (e.g., Google Play, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads or installs from app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface.

criteria.name: Content Quality
criteria.description: Quality and relevance of the educational content provided.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Effectiveness and innovation in the use of AI for educational purposes.

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: Availability and performance across different platforms and devices.

criteria.name: Updates and Support
criteria.description: Frequency of updates and quality of customer support.
criteria.sources: App store updates history, user reviews
